  • Module
  • Package

  • Help

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AppInitializer
Handles the application's bootstrapping sequence and initial stage preparation.
Card
Represents a single immutable playing card in the Cincuentazo game.
Deck
Represents the draw pile (deck) of cards in a Cincuentazo game.
EmptyDeckException
Checked exception thrown when the deck is empty and the table pile does not have enough cards to reshuffle into a new deck.
GameController
Controller class orchestrating core game loop events, state timing, and keyboard interactions.
GameEventAdapter
No-op adapter for IGameEventListener.
GameException
Abstract root of all Cincuentazo custom exceptions.
GameRuleViolationException
Unchecked exception thrown when an internal game state becomes inconsistent or when game logic is invoked in a way that violates the engine's preconditions.
GameState
An immutable snapshot of the public game state visible to all players at the moment a machine player must make a decision.
GameView
Handles all UI rendering, layout coordination, and visual animations for the game screen.
HumanPlayer
Represents the human participant in a Cincuentazo game.
IGameEventListener
Observer interface for game lifecycle events emitted by TurnManager.
InvalidPlayerCountException
Unchecked exception thrown when an invalid number of players is provided during game setup.
InvalidPlayException
Checked exception thrown when a player attempts to play a card that would cause the table sum to exceed 50, violating the principal game rule.
IPlayer
Defines the complete behavioral contract for any participant in a Cincuentazo game, whether human or machine.
MachinePlayer
Represents a machine-controlled participant in a Cincuentazo game.
MachinePlayThread
A dedicated background thread that processes a machine player's turn with a natural delay before acting, then posts the result back to the JavaFX Application Thread.
MachinePlayThread.ErrorHandler
Callback interface used to report unexpected errors back to the controller on the FX thread.
MachineStrategy
A scoring-based implementation that evaluates each card in the machine's hand and picks the one with the highest score.
MachineThinkingTask
A JavaFX Task that simulates a machine player "thinking" before acting, running the decision and play logic on a background thread.
Main
Main application entry point for the runtime framework compilation layer.
MenuController
Controller class for the main menu view.
NoPlayableCardException
Checked exception thrown when a player cannot play any card from their hand without exceeding the table sum of 50.
PlayerAdapter
Adapter class that provides a complete default implementation of IPlayer for any Cincuentazo player.
Rank
Represents the rank of a playing card and owns its value logic for the Cincuentazo game.
SceneManager
Singleton class responsible for managing the primary JavaFX Stage and handling scene transitions throughout the application.
TablePile
Represents the central pile of played cards on the table in a Cincuentazo game.
TurnManager
Central coordinator for a Cincuentazo game session.
